hero.subtitle: CUSTOMER SUPPORT
hero.title: We're Here to Help You Succeed
hero.description: Get the support you need to make the most of your e-commerce business with our comprehensive resources and dedicated team.

categories.title: Documentation
categories.description: Comprehensive guides and tutorials to help you get started and make the most of our platform.

categories.title: Video Tutorials
categories.description: Step-by-step video guides showing you how to use our features effectively.

categories.title: Community Forum
categories.description: Connect with other users, share experiences, and get advice from the community.

categories.title: Technical Support
categories.description: Get direct assistance from our technical team for any issues you encounter.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to common questions about our platform and services.

questions.question: How do I set up my account?
questions.answer: Setting up your account is simple. Just click the 'Get Started' button, fill in your details, and follow the onboarding process. We'll guide you through each step.

questions.question: What platforms do you support?
questions.answer: We support all major e-commerce platforms including Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, PrestaShop, and more. Check our integration page for the full list.

questions.question: Can I change my plan later?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will take effect in your next billing cycle.

questions.question: Do you offer refunds?
questions.answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with our service. Contact our support team to process your refund.

contact.title: Still Need Help?
contact.description: Our support team is available to assist you with any questions or concerns.

options.title: Email Support
options.description: Get help via email within 24 hours

options.title: Live Chat
options.description: Chat with our support team in real-time
